title: Hornet Removal in Franklin Square | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Franklin Square homes and businesses.
intro: Franklin Square residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout Franklin Square, from the tree-lined streets near Rath Park to the bustling commercial areas along Hempstead Turnpike. Our trained technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations with proven methods tailored to Long Island's unique pest challenges.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and the greater Long Island community for years with reliable, same-day hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use safe, eco-friendly treatments that protect your family, pets, and property while completely eliminating aggressive hornet colonies.
localContext: Franklin Square's mature trees, residential gardens, and proximity to parks like Rath Park and Wellington C. Mepham High School grounds create ideal nesting conditions for hornets during warmer months. The mix of post-war suburban homes and newer construction throughout the neighborhood means hornets can nest in attics, eaves, sheds, and dense landscaping common to the area.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Franklin Square. Once you contact us, we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Our technicians will safely assess the nest location and perform complete removal, ensuring your property is hornet-free.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide upfront pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Franklin Square during certain seasons?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornet activity in Franklin Square peaks from late spring through early fall, typically May through October. During these months, hornets build nests in trees, under eaves, in attics, and around sheds. Early detection and removal are crucial, as nests grow larger and more dangerous as the season progresses.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use proven safety protocols and eco-friendly treatments designed to eliminate hornets while protecting your loved ones and pets. We advise keeping family members and pets indoors during the removal process, and the treated area is typically safe within a few hours after service completion.
